stories.title: Rodgers says he'll retire after season: 'This is i...
stories.summary: Steelers quarterback Aaron Rodgers said Wednesday that the 2026 season will be the last of his Hall of Fame-worthy career.

stories.title: Blazers lay off many business-side employees
stories.summary: The Portland Trail Blazers have laid off a significant number of business-side employees as part of a reorganization under new owner Tom Dundon.

stories.title: Mizzou's Hardy thankful, starts road to rehab
stories.summary: Ahmad Hardy is back in Missouri just over a week after the All-America running back was shot in his home state of Mississippi. Missouri's football program released a 14-second video Wednesday in which Hardy said he was "starting the road to my rehab."

stories.title: Colts' Ward 'whole' again after tragedy, injuries
stories.summary: After two seasons of heartbreak and injury, Colts cornerback Charvarius Ward, who pondered retirement, said he opted to return because he's in a better headspace.

stories.title: Kentucky, Gonzaga agree to discontinue series
stories.summary: Kentucky and Gonzaga have mutually agreed to discontinue a men's college basketball series that had been scheduled to run for two more seasons.
